subcodes.first_line: O ye who draw nigh unto the Divine Threshold! Jinab-i-Aqa Ghulam-Husayn hath traversed many a stage and crossed seas and shores until [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مقربان درگاه الهی جناب آقا غلامحسین طی مراحل و قطع بحور و سواحل نموده تا
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @love of God, @spiritual transformation, @being a source of light; guidance
